F04 Search & Filter: Searching 'nike' matches brand/product name/tag and lists results ordered by relevance.
Three-character input triggers up to 10 autocomplete suggestions within 300ms; arrow keys navigate.
Adjusting the min/max slider refreshes results immediately and reflects in the URL query.
Multiple categories combine with OR logic; deselecting recomputes results instantly.
Changing the sort dropdown keeps the same search filters but resets to page 1.
Pages render 20 items; the Next button disables on the last page.
When 0 results, show 5 recommended keywords and 6 popular categories to reduce bounce.
Search typo correction - did you mean
Typing 'shooo' surfaces 'shoes' suggestion with an auto-search option.
Input like '<script>alert(1)</script>' is HTML-escaped and never executes on the results page.
F05 Shopping Cart: Selecting options on product detail and clicking Add increments the cart badge and shows a toast.
Qty buttons recalc price immediately; negative or zero values are rejected.
Delete shows a confirm dialog, then an 'Undo' toast for 5 seconds.
Cart - block add when stock insufficient
If current stock < requested qty, show 'out of stock'; backend also returns HTTP 400.
On login, the guest cart is auto-merged into the user's cart; same-SKU items have quantities summed.
If a price differs at checkout vs. add-time, show a 'price changed' banner requiring user acknowledgement.
If last modified >30 days, a batch clears the cart and the user receives a single email notice.
The 51st distinct SKU shows a 'max 50 SKUs' notice.
Adding in Tab A reflects in Tab B on focus or via 30s polling.
F06 Checkout & Payment: Mock card (4242…) approves successfully → order transitions to PAID → receipt mailed.
Selecting Kakao Pay redirects externally; callback success transitions order to PAID.
On PG auth fail/decline, the transaction rolls back, stock reservation reverts, and the user is prompted to retry.
For orders ≥50K KRW the installment option appears; selecting passes installment=12 to PG.
Admin clicks Refund → PG cancel call → order REFUNDED → refund email sent.
Per-item refund is supported; total cannot exceed paid amount; refund reason is mandatory.
From order detail, download a PDF receipt containing business info and VAT split.
Idempotency-key ensures double-clicking the Pay button results in a single processed payment.
On 5xx, PG retries 5 times at 1/5/30/60/360 minute intervals; handler must be idempotent.
